title: Variational Quantum Simulation: NISQ-Era Approaches
description: Learn variational methods for Hamiltonian simulation on near-term quantum devices. Master the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE), variational time evolution, and adaptive ansatz strategies for simulating quantum dynamics.
learningObjectives: Understand the variational principle and its application to simulation
Implement variational quantum eigensolver (VQE) for ground state preparation
Apply variational real-time evolution (VTE) methods for dynamics
Design adaptive ansatze for efficient simulation
Analyze barren plateaus and their mitigation in variational circuits
Compare variational methods with product formulas for NISQ devices
